---
title: datarace
description: "Detect goroutines capturing changing variables."
sidebar:
  badge:
    text: warning
    class: severity-indicator severity-warning
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-check-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

**Default severity:** <span class="severity-indicator severity-warning" aria-hidden="true"></span> `warning`

Detect goroutines capturing changing variables. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
for _, value := range values { go func() { use(value) }() }
```

## Good

```go
for _, value := range values { go func(current int) { use(current) }(value) }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only datarace`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`.
